prestazioni: Engine swap to Mazda's MZR 2.3L DISI Turbo (L3-VDT) from the Mazdaspeed6, retaining the Senku's AWD platform with a custom bellhousing adapter (MazdaSpeed Performance) and reinforced transmission (PPF delete + Quaife ATB differential for the GKN Driveline AWD system).

Forced induction upgrade with a Garrett GTX3582R turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) on a custom tubular manifold (CXRacing) paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and 3.5" V-band downpipe (CorkSport) with a GESI 300-cell catalytic converter.

Fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, Radium Engineering dual catch can setup, and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom flex-fuel mapping for E85 compatibility (tuned by Mazdaspeed Concepts).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Senku-specific, not the RX-8 variant) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and duckbill rear wing (all in raw carbon weave).

OEM+ aggressive stance via Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for the Senku's 1,450kg weight) with -30mm front and -25mm rear ride height, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +30 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear) in matte gunmetal with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear).

Full interior carbon fiber overhaul: Seibon carbon fiber door cards, dashboard, and center console (Senku-specific molds), paired with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8-point bolt-in with harness bar) in gloss black powdercoat.
